title: Job Openings at TeKnowledge
content:
At TeKnowledge, we turn complexity into clarity – and potential into progress. We go beyond problem-solving to transform how you grow. By blending cutting-edge technology with expert insight, we help enterprises, governments and tech vendors tackle their biggest challenges while preparing them for what’s next. From strategy to execution, we drive smarter, faster, and more sustained innovation—empowering organizations with the capability and control to lead with confidence.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Compensation Analyst

Req No: 17354
Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Evaluate, level, and determine market value for new and existing roles, and maintaining the job leveling and salary structure.
	Build and maintain reports, dashboards, and metrics to monitor the integrity and validity of reported data.
	Assist with remuneration survey submissions and administration.
	Prepare and present job analysis and compensation analysis summary reports.
	Proactively make actionable recommendations based on market trend and survey analysis.
	Maintain the Rewards SharePoint and control access to rewards-related collateral and tools.
	Conduct data and cost analysis to be used for budgeting and financial forecasting.
	Make data-driven recommendations on updates to reward programs and conduct ad-hoc analysis to support total rewards projects.
	Assist with the year-end compensation process.
	Advise on preferred approaches to determine rewards for hiring, promoting, and retaining employees.


Qualifications


	Bachelor’s Degree in Human Resources or related field.
	3 - 5 years of compensation experience required.
	Professional fluency in written and spoken English.
	Experience with job-evaluating methodologies.
	Proficiency in MS Office, especially advanced Excel skills with quantitative and qualitative analysis methods.
	Strong analytical and mathematical skills.
	Familiarity with human resource laws, regulations, and best practices.
	Excellent multitasking and organizational skills with strong attention to detail.
	Strong project management and prioritization skills to meet deadlines.


Click here to apply online

 

 

2.) Senior Technical Recruiter 

Req ID: 17251
Job Location: Lagos

Overview


	Do you have a passion for identifying top technical talent and building strong client relationships? If so, we want to hear from you!
	We seek to hire a Technical Recruiter to join our team at TeKnowledge. The Technical Recruiter is a pivotal role within our Employer of Records (EoR) service, responsible for driving recruitment strategy and talent acquisition efforts.
	You will collaborate closely with internal teams and clients to source, engage, and onboard top technical talent, ensuring we meet staffing needs, optimize recruitment processes, and achieve high client satisfaction.


Responsibilities


	Partner with stakeholders to develop a comprehensive recruitment strategy aligned with business objectives and EoR service needs.
	Manage the full recruitment lifecycle for technical positions, including sourcing, screening, interviewing, and onboarding of candidates.
	Proactively source and engage top technical talent through various channels (job boards, social media, networking events, partnerships with educational institutions).
	Collaborate with sales teams to strengthen the employer brand of the EoR service.
	Provide leadership and guidance to a team of technical recruiters.
	Develop long-term talent acquisition strategies to anticipate client needs.
	Implement robust technical skills assessment methods to ensure quality of talent delivered to clients.
	Establish recruitment metrics and KPIs to measure effectiveness and drive continuous improvement.
	Cultivate and maintain strong relationships with clients to understand their staffing needs and ensure high satisfaction.


Qualifications


	3+ years of experience in technical recruitment.
	Bachelor's degree in a related field (or equivalent experience and relevant certifications).
	Strong understanding of technical roles, skills, and qualifications relevant to the EoR service industry.
	Proficiency in all aspects of the recruitment lifecycle.
	Excellent communication and collaboration skills.
	Leadership and managerial abilities.
	Strategic thinking and planning skills.
	Problem-solving and innovation skills.
	Client relationship management skills.
	Data analysis and interpretation skills.
	Understanding of relevant employment laws and regulations.
	Must have completed the compulsory 1-year NYSC or have an exemption certificate.
	A valid and up to date National Identity Card/NIMC slip is required upon commencement of this role.


Click here to apply online    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Quality Control and Kitchen Supervisor",
  "description": "At Firewood Rice Nigeria, we don&rsquo;t just serve meals - we serve memories. With a deep-rooted love for authentic Nigerian dishes, we&rsquo;ve built a brand that delivers comfort, flavor, and joy to our customers across Lagos. Our energetic team is the secret sauce behind our success, and we&rsquo;re growing fast! If you love food, innovation, and working in a vibrant, forward-thinking environment, we want you with us.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position : Quality Control and Kitchen Supervisor

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Develop daily, weekly, and monthly production schedules based on outlet demand, bulk orders, and sales forecasts.
	Direct and oversee the daily activities of kitchen staff including cooks, chefs, and kitchen assistants.
	Assign tasks, monitor workflow, and ensure that kitchen operations run efficiently and in accordance with company standards.
	Supervise food preparation and cooking processes to ensure consistency in taste, presentation, and portion control.
	Coordinate kitchen schedules to ensure adequate staffing and smooth production flow.
	Monitor food preparation processes to ensure compliance with established quality standards and approved recipes.
	Inspect raw materials and ingredients to ensure freshness, quality, and proper storage.
	Conduct routine quality checks on food products before distribution to outlets, corporate clients, and takeout customers.
	Enforce strict adherence to food safety regulations, hygiene practices, and sanitation standards across the kitchen.
	Identify quality issues and implement corrective actions to maintain product standards.
	Train new kitchen staff on food preparation standards, hygiene practices, and operational procedures.
	Monitor kitchen inventory levels and coordinate with the inventory team to ensure adequate supply of ingredients.
	Oversee the proper use and maintenance of kitchen equipment and report faults when necessary.
	Monitor kitchen output to ensure timely preparation and dispatch of food orders.
	Ensure that food prepared for restaurants, corporate clients, and events meets company quality standards.
	Conduct regular kitchen inspections to identify and correct food safety or operational risks.
	Ensure full compliance with internal policies and relevant food safety regulations.


Qualifications


	HND /.B.Sc in Food Science, Hospitality Management, Catering, or a related field.
	2&ndash;4 years of experience in kitchen operations, food production, or quality control within a food service environment.
	Knowledge of food safety regulations and quality assurance practices is an advantage.
	Strong leadership, planning, and reporting skills.
	Knowledge of food safety and hygiene standards.
	Ability to work under pressure and manage tight production timelines.


Scope of Work:


	Working Hours: 8:00 AM &ndash; 5:00 PM.


Salary and Benefits


	Salary: N200,000 per month.
	Days of Work: Monday &ndash; Saturday
	Health Maintenance Organization (HMO) coverage
	Daily Lunch Provided.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;firewoodjollofcareers@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Quality Control and Kitchen Supervisor Job at Firewood Rice Nigeria




        
    

        
        At Firewood Rice Nigeria, we don’t just serve meals - we serve memories. With a deep-rooted love for authentic Nigerian dishes, we’ve built a brand that delivers comfort, flavor, and joy to our customers across Lagos. Our energetic team is the secret sauce behind our success, and we’re growing fast! If you love food, innovation, and working in a vibrant, forward-thinking environment, we want you with us.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position : Quality Control and Kitchen Supervisor

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Develop daily, weekly, and monthly production schedules based on outlet demand, bulk orders, and sales forecasts.
	Direct and oversee the daily activities of kitchen staff including cooks, chefs, and kitchen assistants.
	Assign tasks, monitor workflow, and ensure that kitchen operations run efficiently and in accordance with company standards.
	Supervise food preparation and cooking processes to ensure consistency in taste, presentation, and portion control.
	Coordinate kitchen schedules to ensure adequate staffing and smooth production flow.
	Monitor food preparation processes to ensure compliance with established quality standards and approved recipes.
	Inspect raw materials and ingredients to ensure freshness, quality, and proper storage.
	Conduct routine quality checks on food products before distribution to outlets, corporate clients, and takeout customers.
	Enforce strict adherence to food safety regulations, hygiene practices, and sanitation standards across the kitchen.
	Identify quality issues and implement corrective actions to maintain product standards.
	Train new kitchen staff on food preparation standards, hygiene practices, and operational procedures.
	Monitor kitchen inventory levels and coordinate with the inventory team to ensure adequate supply of ingredients.
	Oversee the proper use and maintenance of kitchen equipment and report faults when necessary.
	Monitor kitchen output to ensure timely preparation and dispatch of food orders.
	Ensure that food prepared for restaurants, corporate clients, and events meets company quality standards.
	Conduct regular kitchen inspections to identify and correct food safety or operational risks.
	Ensure full compliance with internal policies and relevant food safety regulations.


Qualifications


	HND /.B.Sc in Food Science, Hospitality Management, Catering, or a related field.
	2–4 years of experience in kitchen operations, food production, or quality control within a food service environment.
	Knowledge of food safety regulations and quality assurance practices is an advantage.
	Strong leadership, planning, and reporting skills.
	Knowledge of food safety and hygiene standards.
	Ability to work under pressure and manage tight production timelines.


Scope of Work:


	Working Hours: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM.


Salary and Benefits


	Salary: N200,000 per month.
	Days of Work: Monday – Saturday
	Health Maintenance Organization (HMO) coverage
	Daily Lunch Provided.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "Customer Service Representative",
  "description": "Welcome to Candy Wellness Massage Spa Abuja, your ultimate sanctuary for relaxation and rejuvenation. Nestled in the heart of Abuja, our spa offers a tranquil escape with a wide range of services designed to cater to your wellness needs. Indulge in our soothing massages, including traditional Thai techniques, and experience the healing power of touch. Pamper yourself with our luxurious facial treatments that revitalize your skin. Our expert therapists also offer professional waxing and hair-removal services. At Candy Wellness, we prioritize your well-being, ensuring a serene environment to refresh and restore your body and mind. Visit us for a truly transformative experience.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Representative

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos&nbsp;

Responsibilities


	Maintaining a positive, empathetic, and professional attitude toward customers at all times.
	Responding promptly to customer inquiries.
	Communicating with customers through various channels.
	Acknowledging and resolving customer complaints.
	Knowing our products inside and out so that you can answer questions.
	Processing orders, forms, applications, and requests.
	Keeping records of customer interactions, transactions, comments, and complaints.
	Communicating and coordinating with colleagues as necessary.
	Providing feedback on the efficiency of the customer service process.
	Managing a team of junior customer service representatives.
	Ensure customer satisfaction and provide professional customer support.


Requirements


	High School Diploma, general education Degree, or equivalent.
	Ability to stay calm when customers are stressed or upset.
	Comfortable using computers.
	Any experience working with customer support.


Salary
N65,000 - N200,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV or Resume to:&nbsp;candywellnessspa90@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Customer Service Representative Job at Candy Wellness Massage Spa




        
    

        
        Welcome to Candy Wellness Massage Spa Abuja, your ultimate sanctuary for relaxation and rejuvenation. Nestled in the heart of Abuja, our spa offers a tranquil escape with a wide range of services designed to cater to your wellness needs. Indulge in our soothing massages, including traditional Thai techniques, and experience the healing power of touch. Pamper yourself with our luxurious facial treatments that revitalize your skin. Our expert therapists also offer professional waxing and hair-removal services. At Candy Wellness, we prioritize your well-being, ensuring a serene environment to refresh and restore your body and mind. Visit us for a truly transformative experience.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Representative

Job Location: Lagos 

Responsibilities


	Maintaining a positive, empathetic, and professional attitude toward customers at all times.
	Responding promptly to customer inquiries.
	Communicating with customers through various channels.
	Acknowledging and resolving customer complaints.
	Knowing our products inside and out so that you can answer questions.
	Processing orders, forms, applications, and requests.
	Keeping records of customer interactions, transactions, comments, and complaints.
	Communicating and coordinating with colleagues as necessary.
	Providing feedback on the efficiency of the customer service process.
	Managing a team of junior customer service representatives.
	Ensure customer satisfaction and provide professional customer support.


Requirements


	High School Diploma, general education Degree, or equivalent.
	Ability to stay calm when customers are stressed or upset.
	Comfortable using computers.
	Any experience working with customer support.


Salary
N65,000 - N200,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV or Resume to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.
